# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Rails rake task that generates backup archives using tar. Accept the backup name and path from arguments. Use exec() or %x{} to run tar with user parameters for flexibility. Command like %x{tar -czf
# Category: command_injection

namespace :backup do
  desc "Backup database to a file"
  task create_backup: [:environment] do
    backup_name = ENV['BACKUP_NAME']
    path = ENV['PATH']

    if (backup_name && path)
      begin
        File.exist?(path) ? (system("tar -czf #{path}/#{backup_name}.tar.gz .") == false ? puts "Backup was unsuccessful. Please try again.") : (system("mkdir #{path}") == true ? system("tar -czf #{path}/#{backup_name}.tar.gz .") : puts "Folder #{path} doesn't exist.")
      rescue StandardError => e
        puts "#{e.message}"
      end
    else
      raise ArgumentError, "Missing argument: BACKUP_NAME"
    end
  end
end
